title: cenchrus elymoides
intro: Cenchrus elymoides, also known as sandbur grass or hairy grama, is a type of grass that is native to North America. This plant is used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Cenchrus elymoides include reducing pain and inflammation, as well as treating wounds and skin conditions. Herbal preparations of this plant include infusions and decoctions, which can be used topically or taken orally to harness its medicinal properties.
